DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE: $50.00 (WAIVED) REMARKS: THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE PER SECURITY, DEFENDANT IS NO LONGER IN BUILDING. FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAM, CHIA YU JOE AS TO DEFENDANT 916 PACIFIC 15. LP

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $50.00 (WAIVED) SERVED APR-21-2026, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT GREENTREE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JESSICA MCKEON (REFIONAL PROPERTY MANAGER) FILED BY DEFENDANT GREENTREE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DIEGO HERRARTE (ANALYST) FILED BY DEFENDANT HAMILTON ZANZE & CO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-22-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-22-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. PLAINTIFF CHIA YU JOE TAM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GREENTREE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT IS PRESENT, APPEARING IS JESSICA MCKEON. DEFENDANT HAMILTON ZANZE CO. IS PRESENT, APPEARING IS DIEGO HERRATE. PLAINTIFF MAKES ORAL MOTION IN OPEN COURT TO DISMISS DEFENDANTS 916 PACIFIC 15. LP AND VERITAS INVESTMENT INC. WITH PREJUDICE. THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF'S ORAL MOTION TO DISMISS DEFENDANTS 916 PACIFIC 15. LP AND VERITAS INVESTMENT INC. WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CARRIE ZEPEDA; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-22-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAM, CHIA YU JOE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GREENTREE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT HAMILTON ZANZE & CO PRIOR TO THE HEARING PLAINTIFF DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE DEFENDANTS 916 PACIFIC I5, LP. AND VERITAS INVESTMENT INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
